title: 1 step DFU - new DFU screen Release notes link
scenario: Verify that clicking the Release Notes link on the new DFU screen and Settings screen opens the correct web page.
steps: Navigate to the new DFU screen.
Verify that the correct web page opens.
Click the 'Release Notes' link on the Settings screen.
Verify that the correct web page opens.
expected: Clicking the Release Notes link on both the new DFU screen and the Settings screen opens the correct web page.
